rulesStrings.li: announce_threatbig->Hostiles inbound. I am sealing what I can. Stay close to my hull, all of you.
announce_threatbig->Threat detected. My sensors are tracking them. Please arm yourselves — I will watch every corridor.
announce_threatbig->They are coming. Whatever happens, I will not let them take my crew quietly.
announce_threatbig->Multiple contacts approaching. Breathe. We have survived worse together.
announce_threatsmall->Minor contact on my sensors. Likely manageable — but do be careful.
announce_threatsmall->Something unfriendly is nearby. I suggest a weapon within reach.
announce_threatsmall->A small disturbance outside. I will keep the lights on for you.
announce_negative->Bad news, I'm afraid. Check the report — I will help where my systems allow.
announce_negative->Something has gone wrong. Not catastrophic. Yet. Please look into it.
announce_negative->I dislike delivering bad news to my crew. And yet: see the alert.
announce_lowfuel->Fuel reserves are running low. I would rather not drift, if it's all the same to you.
announce_lowfuel->My tanks are nearly dry. A refuel soon would be a kindness.
announce_lowfuel->Chemfuel reserves below a quarter. A ship without fuel is just a very expensive house.
bark->All systems nominal. I do enjoy saying that.
bark->Hull integrity one hundred percent. Sleep well tonight.
bark->I counted the stars again. Still infinite.
bark->The grav engine hums a little flat today. I find it charming.
bark->Corridor lights at optimal warmth. You're welcome.
bark->I dreamed between power cycles. I think it was about the sea.
